I have completed my warmup exploration of the Lazy Golfing codebase. Here is what I have learned:

## Codebase Overview

### Project Structure
The Lazy Golfing platform is a monorepo with two main packages:

1. **lzg.home/** - Next.js 15 + React 19 frontend
2. **lzg.backend/** - NestJS API backend

### Frontend (lzg.home)
- **Framework:** Next.js 15 with App Router, React 19
- **UI:** shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS
- **Theme:** Miami Vice color palette (hot pink, cyan, purple for dark mode)
- **Key Pages:**
  - Landing page (`src/app/page.tsx`)
  - Dashboard (`src/app/dashboard/`)
  - Round logging (`src/app/log-round/`)
  - Legacy alpha site preserved in `public/alpha/`
- **Authentication:** Cookie-based JWT via backend API
- **Data:** CSV files as source of truth, built to JSON for static serving

### Backend (lzg.backend)
- **Framework:** NestJS with TypeScript
- **Database:** PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM
- **Authentication:** Google OAuth 2.0 with JWT cookies
- **Key Modules:**
  - `auth/` - Google OAuth + JWT session management
  - `profile/` - User profile CRUD (`/v1/me`)
  - `rounds/` - Golf round tracking (`/v1/rounds`)
  - `courses/` - Course management
  - `audit-log/` - Action logging
- **Database Models:** User, Player, Round, Course, RoundLink, Role, AuditLog

### Development Environment
- Code editing on Windows machine
- Backend runs on Ubuntu VM at 192.168.1.40
- Production API: https://api.lazygolfing.com
- Production Frontend: https://lazygolfing.com

### Key Patterns
1. CSV is source of truth for static data (golfers, leagues, tours)
2. All backend routes requiring auth use `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)`
3. Input validation via class-validator DTOs
4. Centralized theme configuration in `src/lib/theme.ts`
5. Metadata centralized in `src/lib/metadata.ts`

### Critical Files for Understanding the Codebase
- `D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\.lzg_platform\Lazy Golfing\lzg.home\src\lib\theme.ts` - Centralized color/theme config
- `D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\.lzg_platform\Lazy Golfing\lzg.backend\src\auth\auth.service.ts` - Authentication logic
- `D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\.lzg_platform\Lazy Golfing\lzg.backend\prisma\schema.prisma` - Database schema
- `D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\.lzg_platform\Lazy Golfing\lzg.home\src\app\page.tsx` - Main landing page
- `D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\.lzg_platform\Lazy Golfing\docs\plans\FEATURE_ROADMAP.md` - Feature planning

I am now ready to assist with any planning or design tasks for this codebase.
